result.stdout:
Usage: lazynuget [path]
       lazynuget --migrate [path]
       lazynuget --migrate-cpm [path]

  path           Folder to open (default: current directory)
  --migrate      Migrate packages.config projects to PackageReference
  --migrate-cpm  Migrate PackageReference projects to Central Package Management
  --version      Show version information
  --help         Show this help message
